summary: Classified the five open PRs from the live inventory shard using the hydrated preflight artifact. No close, label, merge, fix, or PR-opening actions are planned because this job is inventory-only, instant close and low-signal close are disabled, no shared canonical should be invented, and every open PR has either draft/maintainer ownership, failed proof/checks, unresolved bot review findings, or focused technical work requiring normal maintainer handling.

actions.reason: Keep open as related to the hydrated canonical bug thread #78942; do not close or merge from this inventory shard because proof, checks, and an actionable P1 bot finding remain unresolved.
Independent maintainer-owned draft feature/refactor; leave open for the author and normal maintainer review rather than treating it as dedupe or cleanup.
Focused bug-fix PR with unresolved correctness findings and failing proof/checks; keep open rather than closing or replacing from this no-fix inventory shard.
Focused performance PR with failing checks/proof and technical correctness still unresolved; keep open for normal maintainer or author follow-up.
Draft focused gateway behavior PR with partial overlap on main, stale/conflicting approach, and failed proof; keep open and do not mutate from this shard.
